news.title: Capex boom threatens to crowd out buybacks, key equity demand driver
news.summary: Investing.com -- A surge in artificial intelligence-related capital spending is unlikely to undermine share buybacks across the broader U.S. equity market, according to a Deutsche Bank strategy note, which said record corporate earnings continue to support shareholder returns despite a sharp rise in investment spending.
